name: Sweet & Sour Whole Fish B1
recipeIngredient: 1 (1-1/2 to 2 lb) whole sea bass or red snapper
recipeInstructions:
-------------------SWEET AND SOUR SAUCE-------------------
1/2 cup Ketchup
1 tablespoon Oil
2 tablespoons White vinegar
3 tablespoons Sugar
3 drops Red food coloring
1 cup Green pepper, in chunks
1/2 cup White onion, in chunks
1/2 cup Canned diced pineapple
1 teaspoon Cornstarch
1. Clean and scale the fish, leaving on the head and tail. Pat dry. Lightly season the inside and outside of fish with salt and make three slashes 1/4-inch deep on each side for better cooking.
2. Brush the fish with the beaten egg then roll in the flour. Pour 3 inches of oil into a roasting pan and heat to 375°F. Test the temperature by dropping a cube of bread. If it rises to the surface immediately and browns, the oil is ready.
3. Immerse the head in the oil very gently to avoid splattering; slide in the rest of the fish. Deep-fry 3 to 5 minutes on each side. Remove and drain on paper towels. Lay the fish on a serving platter and cover with the sweet and Sour Sauce. Serve immediately.
Temperature (s): HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 00:30
